notes: Pinned OCI SDK contract: CreateScript, GetScript, ListScripts, UpdateScript, and DeleteScript all require the query apmDomainId. Create/Get/Update return the Script body directly, while DeleteScriptResponse returns only headers.

Pinned OCI SDK contract: Script does not expose lifecycle-state fields. The reviewed runtime therefore treats create and update as synchronous read-after-write flows and uses explicit confirm-delete rereads instead of lifecycle polling or work-request tracking.

ListScriptsRequest filters by apmDomainId, exact displayName, and contentType. The published runtime scopes by apmDomainId, sends displayName from spec.displayName, sends contentType from spec.contentType, and adopts only a unique exact match on that reviewed identity surface.

UpdateScriptDetails exposes displayName, contentType, content, contentFileName, parameters, freeformTags, and definedTags. Repo-authored behavior keeps apmDomainId replacement-only while reconciling the update-body surface in place.

OCI response bodies and summaries do not echo the request apmDomainId, so the published runtime mirrors that bound domain into status.apmDomainId. The checked-in status surface intentionally excludes content and parameters to avoid projecting secret-capable script bodies or parameter values.
